memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_audio_codec_cap *codec_cap, enum bt_audio_codec_cap_type type, const uint8_t **data)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cap_get_val

briefdescription.para: Lookup a specific value based on type.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The type id to look for
Pointer to the data-pointer to update when item is found

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_audio_codec_cap *codec_cap, enum bt_audio_codec_cap_type type, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cap_set_val

briefdescription.para: Set or add a specific codec capability value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to set the value in.
Pointer to the data-pointer to set
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Unset a specific codec capability value.

detaileddescription.para: The type and the value will be removed from the codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to set the value in.

briefdescription.para: Extract the frequency from a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to extract data from.
Bitfield of supported frequencies (bt_audio_codec_cap_freq) if 0 or positive
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the supported frequencies of a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract the frequency from a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to extract data from.
Bitfield of supported frame durations if 0 or positive
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the frame duration of a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract the frequency from a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to extract data from.
If true this function will provide the default value of 1 if the type is not found when codec_cap.id is BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LC3.
Number of supported channel counts if 0 or positive
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the channel count of a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to set data for.
The channel count frequency to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract the supported octets per codec frame from a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to extract data from.
Struct to place the resulting values in
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the octets per codec frame of a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to set data for.
The octets per codec frame to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract the maximum codec frames per SDU from a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to extract data from.
If true this function will provide the default value of 1 if the type is not found when codec_cap.id is BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LC3.
Maximum number of codec frames per SDU supported
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the maximum codec frames per SDU of a codec capability.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capabilities to set data for.
The maximum codec frames per SDU to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_audio_codec_cap *codec_cap, uint8_t type, const uint8_t **data)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cap_meta_get_val

briefdescription.para: Lookup a specific metadata value based on type.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The type id to look for
Pointer to the data-pointer to update when item is found

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_audio_codec_cap *codec_cap, enum bt_audio_metadata_type type, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cap_meta_set_val

briefdescription.para: Set or add a specific codec capability metadata value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set the value in.
Pointer to the data-pointer to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Unset a specific codec capability metadata value.

detaileddescription.para: The type and the value will be removed from the codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to set the value in.

briefdescription.para: Extract preferred contexts.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_PREF_CONTEXT for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
preferred context type if positive or 0
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Set the preferred context of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract stream contexts.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_STREAM_CONTEXT for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The stream context type if positive or 0
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Set the stream context of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract program info.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_PROGRAM_INFO for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
Pointer to the UTF-8 formatted program info.
The length of the program_info (may be 0)

briefdescription.para: Set the program info of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract language.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_LANG for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
Pointer to the language bytes (of length BT_AUDIO_LANG_SIZE)
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Set the language of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract CCID list.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_CCID_LIST for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
Pointer to the array containing 8-bit CCIDs.
The length of the ccid_list (may be 0)

briefdescription.para: Set the CCID list of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract parental rating.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_PARENTAL_RATING for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Set the parental rating of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract program info URI.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_PROGRAM_INFO_URI for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
Pointer to the UTF-8 formatted program info URI.
The length of the program_info_uri (may be 0)

briefdescription.para: Set the program info URI of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The program info URI to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract audio active state.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_AUDIO_STATE for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The preferred context type if positive or 0
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Set the audio active state of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The audio active state to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract broadcast audio immediate rendering flag.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_BROADCAST_IMMEDIATE for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.

briefdescription.para: Set the broadcast audio immediate rendering flag of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract assisted listening stream.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_ASSISTED_LISTENING_STREAM for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The assisted listening stream value if positive or 0
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Set the assisted listening stream value of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The assisted listening stream value to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract broadcast name.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_BROADCAST_NAME for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
Pointer to the UTF-8 formatted broadcast name.
The length of the broadcast_name (may be 0)

briefdescription.para: Set the broadcast name of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract extended metadata.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_EXTENDED for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The length of the extended_meta (may be 0)

briefdescription.para: Set the extended metadata of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract vendor specific metadata.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_VENDOR for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
Pointer to the vendor specific metadata.
The length of the vendor_meta (may be 0)

briefdescription.para: Set the vendor specific metadata of a codec capability metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec capability to set data for.
The vendor specific metadata to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Audio codec capabilities APIs.

detaileddescription.para: Functions to parse codec capability data when formatted as LTV wrapped into Codec capability parsing APIs.
